svg.title: XGBoost vs LightGBM tree growth comparison
svg.desc: Two decision trees showing how XGBoost grows level-wise, splitting all nodes at each depth in the same round, while LightGBM grows leaf-wise, splitting only the single best leaf each round and producing an unbalanced tree.
svg.text: level-wise · all nodes per depth split together
leaf-wise · only the best leaf splits each round
